Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A detailed description of a large scale property management companys process for onboarding a new rental property from initial contact to lease signing and internal audits Task Generate a list of targeted open ended questions to clarify and improve understanding of the process Goals of Questions Uncover missing details understand decision criteria clarify roles responsibilities verify timing sequencing learn about exception handling Constraints No SQL queries no implementation details Focus strictly on conceptual understanding

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Provided Process Identify Areas for Questioning Phase 1 Initial Contact and Documentation Who is the property coordinator Regional office specific What happens if documents are never provided Is there a timeout abandonment rule How is outdated defined Is it based on local laws or company policy

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Phase 2 Data Entry and Manager Assignment What exactly goes into the central property database Are there standardized formats Keep conceptual How do you ensure consistency in how data like amenities is recorded Manager assignment The prompt lists 4 criteria workload geography experience track record Which takes precedence Is there a scoring matrix or is it mostly subjective

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: Phase 3 Landlord Manager Meeting What if expectations cannot be aligned for example landlord wants something illegal or against company policy

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Phase 4 Inspection and Photography Can photography and inspection happen simultaneously Is the sequence strict What is the threshold for an inspection failure Minor versus major issues If repairs are needed how long does the landlord have to fix them before the onboarding is paused or canceled

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Phase 5 Marketing and Activation How does the pricing model work Who has the final say if the landlords expected price does not match the models output

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Phase 6 Tenant Screening and Leasing What are the exact disqualifying criteria for a tenant How do you handle a situation where no suitable tenant is found after a certain period Does it loop back to pricing When exactly does the lease get reviewed by the compliance officer and financial analyst Before or after the tenant signs The prompt says Finally implying post signing which is a huge risk if a clause is illegal

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: General Exception Handling Special insurance custom lease clauses How are these escalated Tracking How do you prevent things from falling through the cracks when using multiple tools email CRM PM tools

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Draft the Questions Categorized for Structure and Flow Category 1 Timing Sequencing and SLAs Verifying Timing and Sequencing Question on documentation turnaround Question on inspection repair loops Question on the audit phase crucial catch is the lease audited before signing Category 2 Decision Criteria and Prioritization Understanding Decision Criteria Question on manager assignment weights Question on tenant selection when multiple apply Question on pricing disagreements Category 3 Roles Responsibilities and Handoffs Clarifying Roles and Responsibilities Question on the property coordinator versus property manager boundary Question on who officially approves the property for activation Category 4 Exception Handling and Edge Cases Learning about Exceptions Question on failed alignments with the landlord Question on custom clauses and special insurance Question on vacancy timeout no tenant found Category 5 Data Consistency and Tracking Uncovering Missing Details Question on standardizing property details amenities etc Question on tracking across disparate systems

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refine and Polish Ensuring Open Ended Conceptual Professional Tone Self Correction during drafting Make sure not to ask What table stores the property data Implementation Instead ask How do you ensure consistent categorization of property amenities Conceptual Check against prompt requirements Open ended Yes Conceptual Yes Covers the 5 specific goals Yes

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Final Review of the Output This matches the provided good response ensuring a logical grouping of questions that feel like a natural continuation of a business analyst process expert interview See final output for the exact wording
